description: This JSON file contains junction temperature data for the SoC. Each object in the list represents    the temperature measured by a sensor located at the specified core and vddDomain.     The 'tempMiliDegC' field in each object represents the temperature in milli degree celcius.     The 'description' field in each object provides a brief description of the location of the sensor in the SoC.     The length of the list indicates the number of temperature sensors present in the SoC.

temp_data.description: Sensor in VD_CORE near near MPU region
Sensor in VD_CC near C7x region
Sensor in VD_CORE near GPU region
Sensor in VD_CORE near CPSW0 and R5FSS region
